## Diagram 3

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([titleReducer]) --> Switch{action.type}
    Switch -->|SET_TITLE| SetTitle[setPageTitle with action.title]
    SetTitle --> ReturnTitle[Return state with new title]
    Switch -->|SET_SUB_TITLE| SetSubTitle[setPageTitle with action.subTitle]
    SetSubTitle --> ReturnSubTitle[Return state with new subTitle]
    Switch -->|SET_DESCRIPTION| ReturnDescription[Return state with new description]
    Switch -->|CLEAR_TITLES| ClearDoc[Set document.title to FreightVerify]
    ClearDoc --> ReturnClear[Return state with null values]
    Switch -->|SET_OPEN_SEARCH_TOGGLE_SWITCH_VISIBILITY| ReturnToggleVis[Return state with new visibility flag]
    Switch -->|SET_TOGGLE_STATE| ReturnToggle[Return state with new toggle flag]
    Switch -->|default| ReturnDefault[Return unchanged state]
```

## Diagram 4

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class TitleState {
        +string mountPoint
        +object actionCreators
        +object selectors
        +function reducer
    }
    class ActionCreators {
        +setTitle(title)
        +setSubTitle(subTitle)
        +setDescription(description)
        +clearTitles()
        +setToggleSwitchVisibility(flag)
        +setToggleSwitchState(flag)
    }
    class Selectors {
        +getTitle(state)
        +getSubTitle(state)
        +getDescription(state)
        +getOpenSearchToggleSwitchVisibility(state)
        +getOpenSearchToggleState(state)
    }
    class State {
        +string title
        +string subTitle
        +string description
        +boolean openSearchToggleSwitchVisibility
        +boolean toggle
    }
    class Actions {
        +string SET_TITLE
        +string SET_SUB_TITLE
        +string SET_DESCRIPTION
        +string CLEAR_TITLES
        +string SET_OPEN_SEARCH_TOGGLE_SWITCH_VISIBILITY
        +string SET_TOGGLE_STATE
    }
    TitleState --> ActionCreators
    TitleState --> Selectors
    TitleState --> State
    ActionCreators --> Actions
    Selectors --> State
```
